creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #1)
I can't generate a `svn diff` because I'm not working from a SVN working directory and don't have the connectivity to checkout one right now. Have you tried `patch -p1` and then removing empty files?

GNU Patch (since 2.7) also knows how to deal with Git-style diffs. I can also give you a `diff -ruN` if you prefer.
